known_issues: Bearing life reduced if operated above 2000 RPM continuously. Dust accumulation on rotor reduces cooling efficiency by up to 30%.
maintenance: Lubricate bearings every 8000 hours. Clean rotor fins every 3 months in dusty environments.

known_issues: Thermal paste pump-out observed after 200+ thermal cycles. Junction temperature spikes of 15-20C during interrupt storm. Memory leak in legacy CAN driver v1.x.
maintenance: Replace thermal interface material every 18 months. Update CAN driver to v2.x minimum.

known_issues: Junction temperature exceeds 150C when peak load exceeds 90A without adequate heatsinking. Thermal impedance increases with age. Latch-up risk if gate voltage drops below 12V during switching.
maintenance: Replace heatsink thermal interface every 2 years. Monitor forward voltage drop for degradation indicator.

spec.capacitance: 2200 uF per unit, 4 units in parallel

known_issues: Hold-up time drops to 8ms at end of life. ESR increases 3x in cold temperatures below -20C. Ripple current causes additional self-heating.
maintenance: Monitor capacitance and ESR annually. Replace when capacitance drops below 80% of nominal.

known_issues: Self-heating error increases with excitation current. Accuracy degrades to +/-3C at temperature extremes. Drift can reach 2C after 5 years.
maintenance: Annual calibration check. Replace sensor if drift exceeds 5C.
